description: This is a 3D model of a queen-sized bed with a modern, minimalist design. The bed features a simple, rectangular upholstered headboard in a neutral beige tone. The bed frame is also upholstered in a matching beige fabric. The bedding consists of crisp white pillows and a lustrous, satin-like duvet cover in a shimmering silver-blue color. The duvet is artfully draped, showcasing its smooth texture and subtle sheen. The overall impression is one of comfort, luxury, and contemporary style, making it suitable for a bedroom seeking a sophisticated yet understated aesthetic.
